title: The Beautiful People
why_this_song: The Beautiful People by Marilyn Manson (1996) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: The beautiful people, the beautiful people
It's all relative to the size of your steeple
You can't see the forest for the trees
And you can't smell your own shit on your knees
Hey you, are you trying to be mean?
When you live with apes, man, it's hard to be clean

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "beautiful" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "beautiful" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "people" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "people" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Don't bother to resist, or I'll beat you
Capitalism has made it this way
The beautiful people, the beautiful people

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: It's not your fault that you're always wrong

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "The Beautiful People", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "The Beautiful People", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "The Beautiful People" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "The Beautiful People" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "The Beautiful People" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "The Beautiful People", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: "The Beautiful People" was released in 1996. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "The Beautiful People" foi lançada em 1996. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
